pages.text: Half land, half floating lake. A pool sits in its centre, fed with whatever grows in the water it lands over.
$(bold)Waters$()$(br)Freshwater grows $(item)kelp$(), $(item)seagrass$(), and $(item)lily pads$(). Over an ocean it becomes a warm reef — $(item)coral$(), sea pickles, even a rare $(item)sponge$().
$(bold)Mud & banks$()$(br)Over a swamp or mangrove it grows $(item)mud$() and mangroves. The bed is thick with $(item)clay$() and gravel — the point of the island.
